description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Passenger CI tests that runs on push to stable-* and feature/* branches and on pull requests to those branches. The workflow has four jobs: cxx for C++ unit tests on macOS and Ubuntu, integration for integration tests on macOS and Ubuntu, language for unit tests on macOS and Ubuntu, and homebrew_packaging and source_packaging for packaging unit tests on macOS and Ubuntu respectively. Each job checks out the repository, sets up Ruby, and runs tests with Docker or natively depending on the OS.
